state: UNFROZEN — placeholder. No task may run before this manifest is frozen.
freeze_rule: Fill tasks[], set state=FROZEN, commit, append the file sha256 to the v2 ledger (kind=note, subject=t2/pilot-1/manifest-frozen) BEFORE the first worker spawns. Post-freeze edits are amendments.

task_shape.kind: bugfix | multi-file-feature | integration | ambiguous | visible-tests-insufficient | canary
task_shape.canary_plant: canary tasks only: sealed description path, revealed at grading
